titleStmt.title: SII 10.116: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 116. (A.R. No. 41 of 1912.) ON A PILLAR LYING NEAR THE GODOWN IN THE MUNICIPAL MUSEUM, RAJAHMUNDRY, EAST GODAVARI DISTRICT. Ś. 1067 (21st (?) year of Vishṇuvardhana.)

summary.p: States that Sūkkala Prōli-seṭṭi of Penugoṇḍa made a gift of 25 cows for the upkeep of a perpetual lamp in the temple of Vīrabhadrēśvara of Paṭṭisam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kāṁsyani¨rmita
sthālasthāpanayōgyāṁ
ṁtripadikāṁcanasamadiśa
ṁdōmāsahitasya prati
cāṁdrakharīṁdavasya lakṣa
māpayadayaṁkṛti pa
tripumale © prāsādaḥ pa
vanilayaprākārasadgō
ḍā maṇḍapamaṇḍitōnna
ṁgaṁgābhṛtō kārayēt .
yanurāsuraiḥ parivṛ
lāsavāsa spṛhāṁ ma
tyaja dandhakānuraharō bā
cūḍāmaṇiḥ ©
lāvasati ¨rbbhuvō vilasita
pā nāṁkhani ¨rmmukhyā sa¨rvvapurā ma
hāgiripurī tatrābhava ddhā¨rmmikaḥ vaiśyō
vaiśravaṇōpamaḥ kulanidhi ¨rddānākarō
mādhavaśrēṣṭī tasya sutōbhava tpaṭuma
ti śrīvāsudēvāgrajaḥ . khyātaḥ prō[lā-]
bhidhāṇō nayavinayanidhiḥ pōṣakassa
nānāsandhātā bandhulakṣmyā ssaraṇiruru
saddha¨rmmasā¨rtthasya nityaṁ dātā sadvastu
rāśē ramalatarayaśō vinjamāṁbāsutā
grya śśāntaḥ kāṁtyōṣadhīśaḥ pracurataraku
la śśaṁbhupādāṁbujāliḥ . śākābde mu
nita¨rkkakhēṁdugaṇitē pauṣyasitaikāda
śītithyāṁ bhaumadinōttarāyanuyuji
śrī paṭṭisasthāyinē prādā ddīpa makha
ṇḍamaṁḍitaśikhāgraṁ vīrabhadrēśvarā
yācaṁdrā¨rkka mudārakī¨rtti ratula
śrīḥ prōlanāma ssudhīḥ . svasti sa¨rvvalōkā
śraya śrī viṣṇuva¨rddhanamahārājula pra
va¨rddhamānavijayarājya saṁvatsaraṁbulu
21 [?] gu srahi paṭṭisapunāṁṭi śrī
vīrabhadrīśvaramahādēvaraku penugo
ṇḍa sūkkala mādiseṭṭikoḍku prōlise
ṭṭi janniyabōyini vasamuna Akhaṁḍava
¨rttidīpa mokkaṁṭiki modavulu 25 nitya
niyaṁbōṭi mānika māneṇḍu neyi
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamuṁ saṁntānakramuṁ bu
ṁ bōyaṁgalavāṇḍu
Digital edition of SII 10.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
